description_long: This is a modern, stealthy fighter jet with a sleek, angular design and a light gray camouflage paint scheme. The aircraft features sharply swept wings with pronounced leading edges and twin vertical stabilizers canted outward, characteristic of advanced stealth aircraft. The fuselage is streamlined, with a pointed nose and a bubble canopy cockpit positioned near the front. The jet is equipped with two large engine exhausts at the rear, and the landing gear is visible, suggesting a tricycle configuration. Subtle panel lines and insignia markings are present on the wings and tail, adding to its realistic military appearance. The overall form is optimized for aerodynamic efficiency and radar evasion.
description: A sleek, angular stealth fighter jet with swept wings, twin canted vertical stabilizers, and a bubble canopy cockpit in a light gray camouflage scheme.
description_view_0: Rear view showing twin engine exhausts, canted vertical stabilizers, and the broad, angular wings.
description_view_1: Left rear-quarter view highlighting the swept wing, tail configuration, and visible landing gear.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the pointed nose, bubble canopy cockpit, and the wide, angular wingspan.
description_view_3: Right rear-quarter view showing the tail, wing shape, and landing gear from the opposite side.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept wings with pronounced leading edges and no visible winglets; slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin canted vertical stabilizers with a conventional horizontal stabilizer; H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with one nose wheel and two main gear units.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed bubble canopy cockpit, likely single or tandem seat.
